criteria.name: AI-Powered Automation
criteria.description: The extent to which the app automates financial tasks such as expense tracking, categorization, invoice management, and bank reconciliation.

criteria.name: Personalized Financial Advice
criteria.description: The app's ability to provide tailored financial advice based on user data, spending habits, and financial goals.

criteria.name: Expense Tracking and Categorization
criteria.description: The app's capability to automatically track and categorize expenses for better financial insights.

criteria.name: Budgeting and Goal Setting
criteria.description: The availability of budgeting tools and goal-setting features to help users manage their finances effectively.

criteria.name: Investment Analysis and Management
criteria.description: The app's ability to analyze investment opportunities, manage portfolios, and provide investment recommendations.

criteria.name: Integration with Financial Systems
criteria.description: Seamless integration with bank accounts, credit cards, and accounting software for a holistic financial overview.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The app's ease of use, intuitive design, and overall user experience.

criteria.name: AI-driven Reporting and Analytics
criteria.description: Capabilities to generate financial reports, provide insights into cash flow, profitability, and expenses, and support informed decision-making.
